title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Market Management Committee (MMC) 2022-001 Dated January 31,2022 Entitled ?resolution Amending the Percentage of Monthly Surcharge for Late Payment of Rental of Stalls Indicated in the Contract of Lease for Both Batong Malake Public Market and Poblacion Public Market From 25% to 5 % As Per Article , Section 6a.11 (c) of Municipal Ordinance No. 2009-914 or the 2009 Revenue Code of Los Baños? (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON,02/08/2022)
